name: Newt
description: Newt is a lightweight, fully user-space WireGuard tunnel client and TCP/UDP proxy for Pangolin. It connects a site to a Pangolin server to securely expose private resources without port forwarding or opening inbound firewall ports. Headless service with no web interface.

notes.text: Requires a running Pangolin server to connect to.

Get the Newt ID, Newt Secret and Pangolin endpoint by creating a site/node in your Pangolin dashboard; see the documentation link for the exact steps. The installer prompts for these, or set NEWT_ID / NEWT_SECRET / PANGOLIN_ENDPOINT as environment variables for an unattended install.
